title: NEHU Results 2025

detail.title: NEHU Results 2025
detail.short_info: NEHU Result 2025: North Eastern Hill University Result 2025 has been released on nehu.ac.in. Here is the direct Link to check your MBA and M.A 1st, 2nd and 4th Semester Results Online.

content.text: NEHU Result 2025 OUT! North Eastern Hill University (NEHU) has released the 2025 results for various UG and PG courses on its official website. Students can check your results now via the official website using the direct link and instructions provided below.

sections.heading: NEHU Results 2025 Out – Check MBA and M.A Results at nehu.ac.in

content.text: NEHU has officially announced the NEHU Results 2025 (1st, 2nd and 4th Semester) for various undergraduate and postgraduate programs, including MBA and M.A Students who appeared for these exams can now check their results online at nehu.ac.in. To access the NEHU Result PDF, candidates must enter their roll number. Use the direct link below to download your mark sheet and check your result.

sections.heading: How to Check the NEHU Results 2025?

content.text: NEHU (North Eastern Hill University) Results 2025, visit the official NEHU examination results portal, select your course/semester, and enter your roll number to view and download your marksheet online.​

items: Go to the official NEHU results portal: exams.nehu.ac.in.​
Find the “Results” section; click on it to view the complete list of UG, PG, and professional course results.​
Select your specific program and semester (such as BA, BSc, BCom, MA, LLB, MTech, etc.) from the list of available exam results.​
Enter your Roll Number, Registration Number, or other exam credentials as requested.​
Click “Submit” or “View Result”; your individual marksheet will be displayed on the screen.​
Download or print your marksheet for future reference.​
